c74object.name: fluid.knnregressor~
c74object.description: Regression between DataSets using weighted average of neighbours

discussion.p: KNNRegressor is a supervised machine learning algorithm for regression. In order to make predictions, the KNNRegressor must first be fit with an input fluid.dataset~ of data points, each of which is paired (by means of a shared identifier) with another data point in an output DataSet.

It uses an internal kdtree to find an input point's numneighbours nearest neighbours in an input dataset. The output returned is a weighted average of those neighbours' values from the output DataSet.
Read more about fluid.knnregressor~ on the learn platform.
fluid.knnregressor~ is part of the Fluid Decomposition Toolkit of the FluCoMa project. For more explanations, learning material, and discussions on its musicianly uses, visit flucoma.org.

description.p: Name for this instance, so that it can be reused or referred to by other data objects. If none is given, a name will be generated

method.name: reset
method.digest: Return the object to its original state
method.description: Calling reset will change parameter values back to those the object was created with, i.e. any attribute values set in the box will be retained

method.name: refer
method.description: Changes the reference to the data in another named fluid.knnregressor~ object. Changes to the data stored in any referenced will be shared by all other similarly named fluid.knnregressor~ objects.

description.p: Map an input fluid.dataset~ to an output DataSet.
Apply learned mapping to a fluid.dataset~ and write predictions to an output DataSet

ul.li:
targetDataSet:
a fluid.dataset~ to write the predictions into

description.p: Apply the learned mapping to a single data point in a buffer~
The number of columns (dimensions) in this model or dataset / labeset
Resets the internal state of the model
The number of data points (entries / observations) in this model or dataset / labeset

method.name: load
method.description: Replace the internal state of the object from a dict. The message should take the form load dictionary <dictid>

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dump the state of this object from the dump outlet as a dict.

method.name: write
method.description: Save the internal state of the object to a JSON file on disk. With no argument, a file dialog will appear to choose the file. It is always executed at the lowest priority on the main thread, using deferlow internally.

method.name: read
method.description: Replace the internal state of the object from a JSON file on disk. With no argument, a file dialog will appear to choose the file. It is always executed at the lowest priority on the main thread, using deferlow internally.

description.p: Number of neighbours to consider when interpolating the regressed value. The default is 3.
Enable warnings to be issued whenever a parameter value is constrained (e.g. clipped)
Whether to weight neighbours by distance when predicting new points. The default is 1 (true).
